name: Pesto Ravioli W/Chicken
recipeIngredient: 15 ounces chicken tenders or boneless chicken, cut up
3 small zucchini, sliced into 1/4 inch slices
1 large red bell pepper, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a 12-inch skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Cook chicken in the oil for about 4 minutes (longer if using cut-up boneless chicken breasts), turning occasionally, until brown.
3. Remove chicken from the skillet and add broth and ravioli to the same skillet.
4. Bring to boiling; reduce heat; cover and simmer about 4 minutes or until ravioli is tender.
5. Stir in zucchini, bell pepper, and chicken. Cook over medium-high heat for about 3 minutes, stirring occasionally, until vegetables are crisp-tender and chicken is no longer pink in the center.
6. Toss with pesto. Sprinkle with cheese.
